channel.title: K8s on Wuwei1
channel.description: Recent content in K8s on Wuwei1

item.title: mall-swarm K8S 完整部署指南
item.description:
mall-swarm K8S 完整部署指南

基于阿里云 ECS + k3s + Docker Compose 的 mall-swarm 微服务项目部署实战。

架构总览 

 1┌─ ECS-01 (2C8G, CentOS 7.9) ────────────┐    ┌─ ECS-02 (4C8G, CentOS 7.9) ────────────────┐
 2│  IP: 101.37.34.6 / 172.22.111.32       │    │  IP: 47.99.180.47 / 172.22.111.31          │
 3│                                        │    │                                            │
 4│  Docker Compose:                       │    │  k3s (v1.28.13+k3s1):                      │
 5│  ┌────────┐ ┌────────┐ ┌────────────┐  │    │  ┌───────────┐ ┌───────────┐ ┌──────────┐  │
 6│  │ MySQL  │ │ Redis  │ │ Nacos      │  │    │  │ Gateway   │ │ Admin     │ │ Auth     │  │
 7│  │ 5.7    │ │ 7.x    │ │ 2.1.0      │  │    │  │ 8201:30201│ │ 8080      │ │ 8401     │  │
 8│  │ 3306   │ │ 6379   │ │ 8848       │  │    │  └───────────┘ └───────────┘ └──────────┘  │
 9│  └────────┘ └────────┘ └────────────┘  │    │  ┌───────────┐ ┌───────────┐ ┌──────────┐  │
10│  ┌────────┐ ┌────────┐ ┌────────────┐  │    │  │ Portal    │ │ Search    │ │ Monitor  │  │
11│  │ Mongo  │ │ ES     │ │ RabbitMQ   │  │    │  │ 8085      │ │ 8081      │ │ 8101     │  │
12│  │ 4.x    │ │ 7.17.3 │ │ 3.9        │  │    │  └───────────┘ └───────────┘ └──────────┘  │
13│  │ 27017  │ │ 9200   │ │ 5672/15672 │  │    │                                            │
14│  └────────┘ └────────┘ └────────────┘  │    │   Nginx: 101.37.34.6:80 → admin 前端       │
15│  ┌────────┐                            │    └────────────────────────────────────────────┘
16│  │ Nginx  │                            │
17│  │ 80     │                            │     <── 阿里云内网 172.22.0.0/16 -->
18│  └────────┘                            │
19└────────────────────────────────────────┘

前置准备

服务器

ECS-01（基础服务） ECS-02（K8S 应用）
购买方式 按量付费 免费试用
规格 2C8G 4C8G
系统 CentOS 7.9 CentOS 7.9
磁盘 系统 40G + 数据 100G 系统 40G
地域/可用区 华东1 杭州 J 华东1 杭州 J（必须相同）
安全组 同一安全组 sg-bp12lr66o6bfw34dwim5

安全组入方向规则

端口 来源 用途
22 0.0.0.0/0 SSH
80 0.0.0.0/0 Nginx / 前端
443 0.0.0.0/0 HTTPS
2080 0.0.0.0/0 Nginx 代理
3306 172.22.0.0/16 MySQL（仅内网！）
6379 172.22.0.0/16 Redis（仅内网！）
8848 0.0.0.0/0 Nacos
9200 172.22.0.0/16 ES（仅内网！）
27017 172.22.0.0/16 MongoDB（仅内网！）
5672 172.22.0.0/16 RabbitMQ（仅内网！）
15672 0.0.0.0/0 RabbitMQ 管理
30201 0.0.0.0/0 Gateway API
6443 0.0.0.0/0 k3s API（远程管理）

🔴 安全红线：MySQL(3306)、Redis(6379)、MongoDB(27017)、ES(9200) 这四个端口绝对不能开放 0.0.0.0/0。来源限制为你的 VPC 内网段 172.22.0.0/16。

出方向规则

保持默认即可（允许所有出方向流量）。

Phase 1：服务器初始化（两台） 

 1# 设置主机名
 2# ECS-01: hostnamectl set-hostname mall-base
 3# ECS-02: hostnamectl set-hostname mall-k8s
 4
 5# 关闭 SELinux + 防火墙（学习环境简化）
 6setenforce 0
 7sed -i 's/^SELINUX=enforcing$/SELINUX=disabled/' /etc/selinux/config
 8systemctl stop firewalld && systemctl disable firewalld
 9
10# 配置阿里云镜像源（加速下载）
11mv /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo.bak 2>/dev/null
12curl -o /etc/yum.repos.d/CentOS-Base.repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/repo/Centos-7.repo
13yum makecache
14
15# 安装基础工具
16yum install -y wget curl vim net-tools telnet unzip git lrzsz
17
18# 配置 hosts（替换为自己的ip）
19cat >> /etc/hosts << EOF
20172.22.111.32 mall-base
21172.22.111.31 mall-k8s
22EOF
23
24# ECS-01 挂载数据盘（本地部署无需设置）
25mkfs.ext4 /dev/vdb
26mkdir -p /mydata
27mount /dev/vdb /mydata
28echo '/dev/vdb  /mydata  ext4  defaults  0  0' >> /etc/fstab

Phase 2：ECS-01 部署依赖服务

目标

在 ECS-01（101.37.34.6 / 172.22.111.32）上用 Docker Compose 部署 mall-swarm 所需的 9 个依赖服务。

依赖服务一览

服务 镜像 端口 说明
MySQL mysql:5.7 3306 主数据库，密码 root/root
Redis redis:7 6379 缓存
MongoDB mongo:4 27017 文档存储（portal 用）
RabbitMQ rabbitmq:3.9-management 5672 / 15672 消息队列
Elasticsearch elasticsearch:7.17.3 9200 / 9300 搜索引擎
Logstash logstash:7.17.3 4560-4563 日志收集
Kibana kibana:7.17.3 5601 ES 可视化
Nacos nacos/nacos-server:v2.1.0 8848 注册中心 + 配置中心
Nginx nginx:1.22 80 反向代理（后续配置）

在 ECS-01 上安装 Docker

⚠️ 以下命令全部在 ECS-01 上执行。

安装 Docker 

 1# 卸载旧版本（如果有）
 2yum remove -y docker docker-client docker-client-latest docker-common docker-latest \
 3              docker-latest-logrotate docker-logrotate docker-engine
 4
 5# 安装依赖
 6yum install -y yum-utils device-mapper-persistent-data lvm2
 7
 8# 添加阿里云 Docker 镜像源
 9yum-config-manager --add-repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/docker-ce/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo
10
11# 安装 Docker
12yum install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io
13
14# 启动 Docker
15systemctl start docker
16systemctl enable docker
17
18# 验证
19docker --version

配置 Docker 镜像加速 

 1mkdir -p /etc/docker
 2cat > /etc/docker/daemon.json << 'EOF'
 3{
 4  "registry-mirrors": ["https://docker.m.daocloud.io"],
 5  "log-driver": "json-file",
 6  "log-opts": {
 7    "max-size": "100m",
 8    "max-file": "3"
 9  }
10}
11EOF
12
13systemctl daemon-reload
14systemctl restart docker

如果 daocloud 也不通，下面的命令可以测试当前可用的镜像源：

1for url in "https://docker.m.daocloud.io" "https://registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com" "https://dockerproxy.com" "https://mirror.baidubce.com"; do
2echo -n "$url => "
3curl -s --connect-timeout 3 "$url/v2/" > /dev/null && echo "通" || echo "不通"
4done

安装 Docker Compose 

1# GitHub 和 daocloud 从国内可能不通，使用 pip 安装最稳妥
2yum install -y python3 python3-pip
3pip3 install --upgrade pip
4pip3 install docker-compose -i https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/
5
6# 验证（忽略 Python 3.6 的 CryptographyDeprecationWarning）
7docker-compose --version

⚠️ 如果 docker-compose --version 有 Python 版本警告，不影响使用。CentOS 7 自带 Python 3.6。

准备目录和配置文件

创建数据目录 

 1# 在 ECS-01 上执行（全部建在数据盘 /mydata 下）
 2mkdir -p /mydata/mysql/data/db
 3mkdir -p /mydata/mysql/data/conf
 4mkdir -p /mydata/mysql/log
 5
 6mkdir -p /mydata/redis/data
 7
 8mkdir -p /mydata/nginx/conf/conf.d
 9mkdir -p /mydata/nginx/html
10mkdir -p /mydata/nginx/log
11
12mkdir -p /mydata/rabbitmq/data
13mkdir -p /mydata/rabbitmq/log
14
15mkdir -p /mydata/elasticsearch/plugins
16mkdir -p /mydata/elasticsearch/data
17
18mkdir -p /mydata/logstash
19
20mkdir -p /mydata/mongo/db

创建 logstash 配置文件 

 1cat > /mydata/logstash/logstash.conf << 'EOF'
 2input {
 3  tcp {
 4    mode => "server"
 5    host => "0.0.0.0"
 6    port => 4560
 7    codec => json_lines
 8    type => "debug"
 9  }
10  tcp {
11    mode => "server"
12    host => "0.0.0.0"
13    port => 4561
14    codec => json_lines
15    type => "error"
16  }
17  tcp {
18    mode => "server"
19    host => "0.0.0.0"
20    port => 4562
21    codec => json_lines
22    type => "business"
23  }
24  tcp {
25    mode => "server"
26    host => "0.0.0.0"
27    port => 4563
28    codec => json_lines
29    type => "record"
30  }
31}
32filter{
33  if [type] == "record" {
34    mutate {
35      remove_field => "port"
36      remove_field => "host"
37      remove_field => "@version"
38    }
39    json {
40      source => "message"
41      remove_field => ["message"]
42    }
43  }
44}
45output {
46  elasticsearch {
47    hosts => "es:9200"
48    index => "mall-%{type}-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
49  }
50}
51EOF

创建 Nginx 基础配置 

 1cat > /mydata/nginx/conf/nginx.conf << 'EOF'
 2user  nginx;
 3worker_processes  1;
 4
 5error_log  /var/log/nginx/error.log warn;
 6pid        /var/run/nginx.pid;
 7
 8events {
 9    worker_connections  1024;
10}
11
12http {
13    include       /etc/nginx/mime.types;
14    default_type  application/octet-stream;
15
16    log_format  main  '$remote_addr - $remote_user [$time_local] "$request" '
17                      '$status $body_bytes_sent "$http_referer" '
18                      '"$http_user_agent" "$http_x_forwarded_for"';
19
20    access_log  /var/log/nginx/access.log  main;
21
22    sendfile        on;
23    keepalive_timeout  65;
24
25    server {
26        listen       80;
27        server_name  localhost;
28
29        location / {
30            root   /usr/share/nginx/html;
31            index  index.html index.htm;
32        }
33
34        error_page   500 502 503 504  /50x.html;
35        location = /50x.html {
36            root   /usr/share/nginx/html;
37        }
38    }
39}
40EOF

创建 docker-compose-env.yml 

 1cat > /mydata/docker-compose-env.yml << 'EOF'
 2version: '3'
 3services:
 4  mysql:
 5    image: mysql:5.7
 6    container_name: mysql
 7    command: mysqld --character-set-server=utf8mb4 --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
 8    restart: always
 9    environment:
10      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: root
11    ports:
12      - 3306:3306
13    volumes:
14      - /mydata/mysql/data/db:/var/lib/mysql
15      - /mydata/mysql/data/conf:/etc/mysql/conf.d
16      - /mydata/mysql/log:/var/log/mysql
17  redis:
18    image: redis:7
19    container_name: redis
20    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
21    volumes:
22      - /mydata/redis/data:/data
23    ports:
24      - 6379:6379
25  nginx:
26    image: nginx:1.22
27    container_name: nginx
28    volumes:
29      - /mydata/nginx/conf/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf #只挂主配置文件
30      - /mydata/nginx/conf/conf.d:/etc/nginx/conf.d #额外配置目录
31      - /mydata/nginx/html:/usr/share/nginx/html #静态资源根目录挂载
32      - /mydata/nginx/log:/var/log/nginx #日志文件挂载
33    ports:
34      - 80:80
35  rabbitmq:
36    image: rabbitmq:3.9-management
37    container_name: rabbitmq
38    volumes:
39      - /mydata/rabbitmq/data:/var/lib/rabbitmq
40      - /mydata/rabbitmq/log:/var/log/rabbitmq
41    ports:
42      - 5672:5672
43      - 15672:15672
44  elasticsearch:
45    image: elasticsearch:7.17.3
46    container_name: elasticsearch
47    user: root
48    environment:
49      - "cluster.name=elasticsearch"
50      - "discovery.type=single-node"
51      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
52    volumes:
53      - /mydata/elasticsearch/plugins:/usr/share/elasticsearch/plugins
54      - /mydata/elasticsearch/data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
55    ports:
56      - 9200:9200
57      - 9300:9300
58  logstash:
59    image: logstash:7.17.3
60    container_name: logstash
61    environment:
62      - TZ=Asia/Shanghai
63    volumes:
64      - /mydata/logstash/logstash.conf:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/logstash.conf
65    depends_on:
66      - elasticsearch
67    links:
68      - elasticsearch:es
69    ports:
70      - 4560:4560
71      - 4561:4561
72      - 4562:4562
73      - 4563:4563
74  kibana:
75    image: kibana:7.17.3
76    container_name: kibana
77    links:
78      - elasticsearch:es
79    depends_on:
80      - elasticsearch
81    environment:
82      - "elasticsearch.hosts=http://es:9200"
83    ports:
84      - 5601:5601
85  mongo:
86    image: mongo:4
87    container_name: mongo
88    volumes:
89      - /mydata/mongo/db:/data/db
90    ports:
91      - 27017:27017
92  nacos-registry:
93    image: nacos/nacos-server:v2.1.0
94    container_name: nacos-registry
95    environment:
96      - "MODE=standalone"
97    ports:
98      - 8848:8848
99EOF

⚠️ 启动前必备 — 修复权限和文件

跳过此步会导致 Elasticsearch、RabbitMQ、Nginx 启动失败。

修复 Elasticsearch 数据目录权限 

1# ES 容器内部运行用户 uid:gid = 1000:1000
2# 宿主机创建的数据目录默认是 root 所有，必须 chown
3chown -R 1000:1000 /mydata/elasticsearch/data
4chown -R 1000:1000 /mydata/elasticsearch/plugins

修复 RabbitMQ 日志目录权限 

1# RabbitMQ 容器内部运行用户 uid:gid = 999:999
2chown -R 999:999 /mydata/rabbitmq/log

修复 Nginx — 复制容器内原生文件 

 1# 不能把 /mydata/nginx/conf 整个目录挂载到 /etc/nginx，会覆盖掉 mime.types 等系统文件
 2# 改用单个文件挂载后，需要确保宿主机配置目录结构正确
 3
 4# 创建一个临时 nginx 容器，从里面复制出必需的文件
 5docker create --name nginx-tmp nginx:1.22
 6docker cp nginx-tmp:/etc/nginx/mime.types /mydata/nginx/conf/
 7docker cp nginx-tmp:/etc/nginx/fastcgi_params /mydata/nginx/conf/
 8docker cp nginx-tmp:/etc/nginx/conf.d /mydata/nginx/conf/
 9docker rm nginx-tmp
10
11# 验证目录结构
12ls -la /mydata/nginx/conf/
13# 应有: nginx.conf, mime.types, fastcgi_params, conf.d/

启动所有服务 

1# 在 ECS-01 上执行
2cd /mydata
3docker-compose -f docker-compose-env.yml up -d

⚠️ 注意：首次启动会从 Docker Hub 拉取镜像，会比较慢（约 10-20 分钟）。如果下载失败，检查镜像加速配置是否正确。

验证所有服务 

1# 查看所有容器运行状态（全部应为 Up）
2docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}"
3
4# 查看是否有启动失败的
5docker ps -a | grep -v Up | grep -v NAMES

逐一验证：

 1# MySQL
 2docker exec mysql mysql -uroot -proot -e "SELECT 1"
 3
 4# Redis
 5docker exec redis redis-cli PING
 6
 7# Elasticsearch
 8curl http://localhost:9200
 9
10# Nacos（等 30 秒启动）
11curl http://localhost:8848/nacos
12
13# RabbitMQ 管理页
14curl http://localhost:15672
15
16# MongoDB
17docker exec mongo mongo --eval "db.version()"
18
19# Kibana
20curl http://localhost:5601

Phase 3 — K8S 集群搭建（k3s）

目标

在 ECS-02（47.99.180.47 / 172.22.111.31）上安装 k3s 轻量级 K8S 集群。

环境说明

项目 值
操作系统 CentOS 7.9 64位
规格 4核8G
k3s 版本 v1.28.13+k3s1
容器运行时 containerd（k3s 内置）
Service CIDR 10.43.0.0/16（默认）
Pod CIDR 10.42.0.0/16（默认）

k3s 默认 CIDR 不与 VPC 网段 172.22.0.0/16 冲突，无需调整。

ECS-02 基础准备

⚠️ 以下命令全部在 ECS-02（ssh root@47.99.180.47）上执行。

1# 配置 hosts
2cat >> /etc/hosts << 'EOF'
3172.22.111.32 mall-base
4172.22.111.31 mall-k8s
5EOF
6
7# 确认与 ECS-01 互通
8ping -c 2 172.22.111.32

安装 k3s

⚠️ GitHub 从阿里云 ECS 访问会被墙，官方安装脚本无法直接下载二进制。需要分两步走。

本地下载 k3s 二进制

在你自己的 Windows 电脑上，用浏览器下载：

1https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/releases/download/v1.28.13+k3s1/k3s

约 62MB。

上传到 ECS-02

在 Windows 终端（PowerShell/Git Bash）中，切换到下载目录执行：

1scp k3s root@47.99.180.47:/usr/local/bin/

安装 k3s

回到 SSH 终端（ECS-02）：

 1# 验证上传成功
 2ls -la /usr/local/bin/k3s
 3chmod +x /usr/local/bin/k3s
 4k3s --version
 5
 6# 下载安装脚本（脚本很小，不依赖 GitHub）
 7curl -sfL https://rancher-mirror.rancher.cn/k3s/k3s-install.sh -o /tmp/k3s-install.sh
 8
 9# 跳过下载，使用已上传的二进制安装
10INSTALL_K3S_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true bash /tmp/k3s-install.sh
11
12# 验证
13kubectl get nodes

预期输出：

1NAME       STATUS   ROLES                  AGE   VERSION
2mall-k8s   Ready    control-plane,master   10s   v1.28.13+k3s1

⚠️ 关键修复 — containerd 镜像加速

k3s 内置 containerd 作为容器运行时，不走 Docker 配置，需要单独设置镜像源。

配置 containerd 镜像 

1cat > /etc/rancher/k3s/registries.yaml << 'EOF'
2mirrors:
3  docker.io:
4    endpoint:
5      - "https://docker.m.daocloud.io"
6EOF
7
8systemctl restart k3s

安装 Docker（辅助用途）

containerd 的 daocloud 镜像源可能缺失 rancher/ 命名空间。需要 Docker 来手动拉取并导入镜像：

 1yum install -y yum-utils
 2yum-config-manager --add-repo https://mirrors.aliyun.com/docker-ce/linux/centos/docker-ce.repo
 3yum install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io
 4
 5cat > /etc/docker/daemon.json << 'EOF'
 6{
 7  "registry-mirrors": ["https://docker.m.daocloud.io"],
 8  "log-driver": "json-file",
 9  "log-opts": {
10    "max-size": "100m",
11    "max-file": "3"
12  }
13}
14EOF
15
16systemctl start docker
17systemctl enable docker

手动导入 traefik 镜像

重启 k3s 后，如果 traefik Pod 状态是 ErrImagePull：

1# 用 Docker 拉取（daocloud 全镜像支持更好）
2docker pull rancher/mirrored-library-traefik:2.10.7
3
4# 导入到 k3s 的 containerd
5docker save rancher/mirrored-library-traefik:2.10.7 | k3s ctr images import -
6
7# 等 Pod 自动重试
8sleep 10
9kubectl get pods -A

后续其他 rancher/ 命名空间的镜像也可能需要同样处理：docker pull → docker save | k3s ctr images import -

验证所有系统 Pod 就绪 

1kubectl get pods -A

预期所有 Pod 状态为 Running 或 Completed。

配置 kubectl 

1echo 'export KUBECONFIG=/etc/rancher/k3s/k3s.yaml' >> ~/.bashrc
2source ~/.bashrc
3
4# 验证
5kubectl cluster-info
6kubectl get pods -n kube-system

如果从本地开发机管理 k3s，把 /etc/rancher/k3s/k3s.yaml 拷贝到本地，将 server 地址改成 https://47.99.180.47:6443 即可（需开放安全组 6443 端口）。

创建微服务日志目录 

1mkdir -p /mydata/app/mall-admin/logs
2mkdir -p /mydata/app/mall-gateway/logs
3mkdir -p /mydata/app/mall-auth/logs
4mkdir -p /mydata/app/mall-portal/logs
5mkdir -p /mydata/app/mall-search/logs
6mkdir -p /mydata/app/mall-monitor/logs

Phase 4 — 获取 Docker 镜像

目标

将 mall-swarm 微服务镜像导入到 ECS-02 的 k3s 集群中，为后续 K8S 部署做准备。

微服务镜像清单

服务 镜像 端口
mall-gateway macrodocker/mall-gateway:1.0-SNAPSHOT 8201
mall-auth macrodocker/mall-auth:1.0-SNAPSHOT 8401
mall-admin macrodocker/mall-admin:1.0-SNAPSHOT 8080
mall-portal macrodocker/mall-portal:1.0-SNAPSHOT 8085
mall-search macrodocker/mall-search:1.0-SNAPSHOT 8081
mall-monitor macrodocker/mall-monitor:1.0-SNAPSHOT 8101

拉取镜像并导入 k3s

⚠️ 在 ECS-02 上执行。

配置 Docker 镜像源

daocloud 镜像源只代理官方镜像（library/*），不代理用户命名空间（macrodocker/*）。需要换用支持全量代理的源。

先用以下命令测试可用的镜像源：

1for url in "https://dockerproxy.net" "https://docker.1panel.live" "https://hub.rat.dev"; do
2  echo -n "$url => "
3  curl -s --connect-timeout 5 "$url/v2/" > /dev/null && echo "通" || echo "不通"
4done

选一个能通的，写入 Docker 配置：

 1cat > /etc/docker/daemon.json << 'EOF'
 2{
 3  "registry-mirrors": ["https://docker.1panel.live"],
 4  "log-driver": "json-file",
 5  "log-opts": {
 6    "max-size": "100m",
 7    "max-file": "3"
 8  }
 9}
10EOF
11
12systemctl restart docker

如果某个源拉取很慢，换其他能通的试试。docker.1panel.live 和 hub.rat.dev 通常是较好的备选。

拉取所有微服务镜像 

1docker pull macrodocker/mall-gateway:1.0-SNAPSHOT
2docker pull macrodocker/mall-auth:1.0-SNAPSHOT
3docker pull macrodocker/mall-monitor:1.0-SNAPSHOT
4docker pull macrodocker/mall-admin:1.0-SNAPSHOT
5docker pull macrodocker/mall-portal:1.0-SNAPSHOT
6docker pull macrodocker/mall-search:1.0-SNAPSHOT

1### 1.1 验证镜像
2
3```bash
4docker images | grep macrodocker

预期输出：

1macrodocker/mall-gateway   1.0-SNAPSHOT   xxx   xxx MB
2macrodocker/mall-auth      1.0-SNAPSHOT   xxx   xxx MB
3macrodocker/mall-monitor   1.0-SNAPSHOT   xxx   xxx MB
4macrodocker/mall-admin     1.0-SNAPSHOT   xxx   xxx MB
5macrodocker/mall-portal    1.0-SNAPSHOT   xxx   xxx MB
6macrodocker/mall-search    1.0-SNAPSHOT   xxx   xxx MB

导入到 k3s containerd 

 1# 一次性批量导入
 2for img in \
 3  macrodocker/mall-gateway:1.0-SNAPSHOT \
 4  macrodocker/mall-auth:1.0-SNAPSHOT \
 5  macrodocker/mall-monitor:1.0-SNAPSHOT \
 6  macrodocker/mall-admin:1.0-SNAPSHOT \
 7  macrodocker/mall-portal:1.0-SNAPSHOT \
 8  macrodocker/mall-search:1.0-SNAPSHOT; do
 9  echo "Importing $img ..."
10  docker save $img | k3s ctr images import -
11done
12
13# 验证 k3s 已识别镜像
14k3s ctr images ls | grep macrodocker

Phase 5 — Nacos 配置导入与修改

目标

将微服务配置导入 Nacos，并修改连接地址为 ECS-01 的实际 IP。

访问 Nacos

打开浏览器访问：http://101.37.34.6:8848/nacos

1默认账号：nacos
2默认密码：nacos

配置说明

原配置使用 Docker Compose 容器名（db、redis、mongo、rabbit、es），需要改为 ECS-01 内网 IP 172.22.111.32。

原地址 改后
db / mongo / redis / rabbit / es / logstash 172.22.111.32
192.168.3.101:8848（Nacos） 172.22.111.32:8848
jwk-set-uri: http://192.168.3.101:8201/... http://mall-gateway-service:8201/mall-auth/rsa/publicKey
minio endpoint: http://192.168.3.101:9090 暂无 MinIO，保留占位

创建配置

逐个在 Nacos 中创建以下 4 个配置（每个微服务只需要 prod 配置）。

mall-admin-prod.yaml

Data ID: mall-admin-prod.yaml Group: DEFAULT_GROUP 配置格式: YAML 配置内容:

 1spring:
 2  datasource:
 3    url: jdbc:mysql://172.22.111.32:3306/mall?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&useSSL=false
 4    username: root
 5    password: root
 6  redis:
 7    host: 172.22.111.32
 8    database: 0
 9    port: 6379
10    password:
11logging:
12  file:
13    path: /var/logs
14  level:
15    root: info
16    com.macro.mall: info
17logstash:
18  host: 172.22.111.32

mall-gateway-prod.yaml

Data ID: mall-gateway-prod.yaml Group: DEFAULT_GROUP 配置格式: YAML

 1spring:
 2  redis:
 3    host: 172.22.111.32
 4    database: 0
 5    port: 6379
 6    password:
 7  security:
 8    oauth2:
 9      resourceserver:
10        jwt:
11          jwk-set-uri: 'http://mall-gateway-service:8201/mall-auth/rsa/publicKey'
12logging:
13  file:
14    path: /var/logs
15  level:
16    root: info
17    com.macro.mall: info
18logstash:
19  host: 172.22.111.32

⚠️ mall-gateway-service 是 K8S Service 名，不是 IP。部署后 k3s 的 CoreDNS 会自动解析。

mall-portal-prod.yaml

Data ID: mall-portal-prod.yaml Group: DEFAULT_GROUP 配置格式: YAML

 1spring:
 2  datasource:
 3    url: jdbc:mysql://172.22.111.32:3306/mall?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&useSSL=false
 4    username: root
 5    password: root
 6  data:
 7    mongodb:
 8      host: 172.22.111.32
 9      port: 27017
10      database: mall-port
11  redis:
12    host: 172.22.111.32
13    database: 0
14    port: 6379
15    password:
16  rabbitmq:
17    host: 172.22.111.32
18    port: 5672
19    virtual-host: /mall
20    username: guest
21    password: guest
22    publisher-confirms: true
23logging:
24  file:
25    path: /var/logs
26  level:
27    root: info
28    com.macro.mall: info
29logstash:
30  host: 172.22.111.32

mall-search-prod.yaml

Data ID: mall-search-prod.yaml Group: DEFAULT_GROUP 配置格式: YAML

 1spring:
 2  datasource:
 3    url: jdbc:mysql://172.22.111.32:3306/mall?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&useSSL=false
 4    username: root
 5    password: root
 6  elasticsearch:
 7    uris: 172.22.111.32:9200
 8management:
 9  health:
10    elasticsearch:
11      response-timeout: 1000ms
12logging:
13  file:
14    path: /var/logs
15  level:
16    root: info
17    com.macro.mall: info
18logstash:
19  host: 172.22.111.32

创建完成后确认

在 Nacos「配置管理 → 配置列表」中应看到 4 个配置：

Data ID Group
mall-admin-prod.yaml DEFAULT_GROUP
mall-gateway-prod.yaml DEFAULT_GROUP
mall-portal-prod.yaml DEFAULT_GROUP
mall-search-prod.yaml DEFAULT_GROUP

⚠️ 初始化 MySQL 数据库和 RabbitMQ

Nacos 配置完成后，必须在部署应用之前初始化数据库和消息队列。

上传 mall.sql

将项目中的 document/sql/mall.sql 上传到 ECS-01：

1# 在 Windows 本地终端执行（切换到 mall.sql 所在目录）
2scp mall.sql root@101.37.34.6:/tmp/

初始化 MySQL

SSH 到 ECS-01 执行：

1# 创建数据库（如果重复执行先删掉重建）
2docker exec -i mysql mysql -uroot -proot -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS mall;"
3docker exec -i mysql mysql -uroot -proot -e "CREATE DATABASE mall DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;"
4
5# 导入表结构
6docker exec -i mysql mysql -uroot -proot --default-character-set=utf8mb4 mall < /tmp/mall.sql
7
8# 验证（应显示 76 张表）
9docker exec -i mysql mysql -uroot -proot -e "USE mall; SHOW TABLES;" | wc -l

配置 RabbitMQ 

1# 创建 /mall 虚拟主机（portal 服务使用）
2docker exec rabbitmq rabbitmqctl add_vhost /mall
3docker exec rabbitmq rabbitmqctl set_permissions -p /mall guest ".*" ".*" ".*"

⚠️ 如果跳过这一步，mall-portal 会因 RabbitMQ 连接失败而不断重启。

Phase 6 — K8S 部署应用服务

目标

将 mall-swarm 的 6 个微服务部署到 ECS-02 的 k3s 集群中。

微服务清单

服务 容器端口 Service 类型 NodePort
mall-gateway 8201 NodePort 30201
mall-auth 8401 ClusterIP -
mall-admin 8080 ClusterIP -
mall-portal 8085 ClusterIP -
mall-search 8081 ClusterIP -
mall-monitor 8101 ClusterIP -

只有 Gateway 需要外部访问，使用 NodePort 暴露。其他服务通过集群内部 Service 名通信。

准备 K8S YAML 文件

在 ECS-02 上创建部署文件目录并写入修正后的 YAML：

以下命令在 ECS-02 上执行。

1mkdir -p /root/k8s
2cd /root/k8s

mall-admin-deployment.yaml 

 1cat > mall-admin-deployment.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: apps/v1
 3kind: Deployment
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-admin-deployment
 6  labels:
 7    app: mall-admin
 8spec:
 9  replicas: 1
10  selector:
11    matchLabels:
12      app: mall-admin
13  template:
14    metadata:
15      labels:
16        app: mall-admin
17    spec:
18      containers:
19        - name: mall-admin
20          image: macrodocker/mall-admin:1.0-SNAPSHOT
21          ports:
22            - containerPort: 8080
23          env:
24            - name: spring.profiles.active
25              value: prod
26            - name: TZ
27              value: Asia/Shanghai
28            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.discovery.server-addr
29              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
30            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.config.server-addr
31              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
32          volumeMounts:
33            - mountPath: /var/logs
34              name: log-volume
35      volumes:
36        - name: log-volume
37          hostPath:
38            path: /mydata/app/mall-admin/logs
39            type: DirectoryOrCreate
40EOF

mall-admin-service.yaml 

 1cat > mall-admin-service.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: v1
 3kind: Service
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-admin-service
 6spec:
 7  type: ClusterIP
 8  selector:
 9    app: mall-admin
10  ports:
11    - name: http
12      protocol: TCP
13      port: 8080
14      targetPort: 8080
15EOF

mall-gateway-deployment.yaml 

 1cat > mall-gateway-deployment.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: apps/v1
 3kind: Deployment
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-gateway-deployment
 6  labels:
 7    app: mall-gateway
 8spec:
 9  replicas: 1
10  selector:
11    matchLabels:
12      app: mall-gateway
13  template:
14    metadata:
15      labels:
16        app: mall-gateway
17    spec:
18      containers:
19        - name: mall-gateway
20          image: macrodocker/mall-gateway:1.0-SNAPSHOT
21          ports:
22            - containerPort: 8201
23          env:
24            - name: spring.profiles.active
25              value: prod
26            - name: TZ
27              value: Asia/Shanghai
28            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.discovery.server-addr
29              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
30            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.config.server-addr
31              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
32          volumeMounts:
33            - mountPath: /var/logs
34              name: log-volume
35      volumes:
36        - name: log-volume
37          hostPath:
38            path: /mydata/app/mall-gateway/logs
39            type: DirectoryOrCreate
40EOF

mall-gateway-service.yaml 

 1cat > mall-gateway-service.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: v1
 3kind: Service
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-gateway-service
 6spec:
 7  type: NodePort
 8  selector:
 9    app: mall-gateway
10  ports:
11    - name: http
12      protocol: TCP
13      port: 8201
14      targetPort: 8201
15      nodePort: 30201
16EOF

mall-auth-deployment.yaml 

 1cat > mall-auth-deployment.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: apps/v1
 3kind: Deployment
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-auth-deployment
 6  labels:
 7    app: mall-auth
 8spec:
 9  replicas: 1
10  selector:
11    matchLabels:
12      app: mall-auth
13  template:
14    metadata:
15      labels:
16        app: mall-auth
17    spec:
18      containers:
19        - name: mall-auth
20          image: macrodocker/mall-auth:1.0-SNAPSHOT
21          ports:
22            - containerPort: 8401
23          env:
24            - name: spring.profiles.active
25              value: prod
26            - name: TZ
27              value: Asia/Shanghai
28            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.discovery.server-addr
29              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
30            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.config.server-addr
31              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
32          volumeMounts:
33            - mountPath: /var/logs
34              name: log-volume
35      volumes:
36        - name: log-volume
37          hostPath:
38            path: /mydata/app/mall-auth/logs
39            type: DirectoryOrCreate
40EOF

mall-auth-service.yaml 

 1cat > mall-auth-service.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: v1
 3kind: Service
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-auth-service
 6spec:
 7  type: ClusterIP
 8  selector:
 9    app: mall-auth
10  ports:
11    - name: http
12      protocol: TCP
13      port: 8401
14      targetPort: 8401
15EOF

mall-portal-deployment.yaml 

 1cat > mall-portal-deployment.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: apps/v1
 3kind: Deployment
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-portal-deployment
 6  labels:
 7    app: mall-portal
 8spec:
 9  replicas: 1
10  selector:
11    matchLabels:
12      app: mall-portal
13  template:
14    metadata:
15      labels:
16        app: mall-portal
17    spec:
18      containers:
19        - name: mall-portal
20          image: macrodocker/mall-portal:1.0-SNAPSHOT
21          ports:
22            - containerPort: 8085
23          env:
24            - name: spring.profiles.active
25              value: prod
26            - name: TZ
27              value: Asia/Shanghai
28            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.discovery.server-addr
29              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
30            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.config.server-addr
31              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
32          volumeMounts:
33            - mountPath: /var/logs
34              name: log-volume
35      volumes:
36        - name: log-volume
37          hostPath:
38            path: /mydata/app/mall-portal/logs
39            type: DirectoryOrCreate
40EOF

mall-portal-service.yaml 

 1cat > mall-portal-service.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: v1
 3kind: Service
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-portal-service
 6spec:
 7  type: ClusterIP
 8  selector:
 9    app: mall-portal
10  ports:
11    - name: http
12      protocol: TCP
13      port: 8085
14      targetPort: 8085
15EOF

mall-search-deployment.yaml 

 1cat > mall-search-deployment.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: apps/v1
 3kind: Deployment
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-search-deployment
 6  labels:
 7    app: mall-search
 8spec:
 9  replicas: 1
10  selector:
11    matchLabels:
12      app: mall-search
13  template:
14    metadata:
15      labels:
16        app: mall-search
17    spec:
18      containers:
19        - name: mall-search
20          image: macrodocker/mall-search:1.0-SNAPSHOT
21          ports:
22            - containerPort: 8081
23          env:
24            - name: spring.profiles.active
25              value: prod
26            - name: TZ
27              value: Asia/Shanghai
28            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.discovery.server-addr
29              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
30            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.config.server-addr
31              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
32          volumeMounts:
33            - mountPath: /var/logs
34              name: log-volume
35      volumes:
36        - name: log-volume
37          hostPath:
38            path: /mydata/app/mall-search/logs
39            type: DirectoryOrCreate
40EOF

mall-search-service.yaml 

 1cat > mall-search-service.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: v1
 3kind: Service
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-search-service
 6spec:
 7  type: ClusterIP
 8  selector:
 9    app: mall-search
10  ports:
11    - name: http
12      protocol: TCP
13      port: 8081
14      targetPort: 8081
15EOF

mall-monitor-deployment.yaml 

 1cat > mall-monitor-deployment.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: apps/v1
 3kind: Deployment
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-monitor-deployment
 6  labels:
 7    app: mall-monitor
 8spec:
 9  replicas: 1
10  selector:
11    matchLabels:
12      app: mall-monitor
13  template:
14    metadata:
15      labels:
16        app: mall-monitor
17    spec:
18      containers:
19        - name: mall-monitor
20          image: macrodocker/mall-monitor:1.0-SNAPSHOT
21          ports:
22            - containerPort: 8101
23          env:
24            - name: spring.profiles.active
25              value: prod
26            - name: TZ
27              value: Asia/Shanghai
28            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.discovery.server-addr
29              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
30            - name: spring.cloud.nacos.config.server-addr
31              value: http://172.22.111.32:8848
32          volumeMounts:
33            - mountPath: /var/logs
34              name: log-volume
35      volumes:
36        - name: log-volume
37          hostPath:
38            path: /mydata/app/mall-monitor/logs
39            type: DirectoryOrCreate
40EOF

mall-monitor-service.yaml 

 1cat > mall-monitor-service.yaml << 'EOF'
 2apiVersion: v1
 3kind: Service
 4metadata:
 5  name: mall-monitor-service
 6spec:
 7  type: ClusterIP
 8  selector:
 9    app: mall-monitor
10  ports:
11    - name: http
12      protocol: TCP
13      port: 8101
14      targetPort: 8101
15EOF

部署所有服务 

1cd /root/k8s
2
3# 批量应用所有 YAML
4kubectl apply -f .
5
6# 查看 Pod 启动状态
7kubectl get pods -w

等待所有 Pod 变成 Running。首次可能需要几分钟，因为 k3s 需要从 containerd 加载镜像。

验证部署 

 1# 查看所有 Deployment
 2kubectl get deployments
 3
 4# 查看所有 Service
 5kubectl get svc
 6
 7# 查看所有 Pod
 8kubectl get pods
 9
10# 查看某个 Pod 的日志（如果启动失败）
11kubectl logs deployment/mall-gateway-deployment

预期结果：

1NAME                     READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
2mall-admin-xxx           1/1     Running   0          xx
3mall-auth-xxx            1/1     Running   0          xx
4mall-gateway-xxx         1/1     Running   0          xx
5mall-monitor-xxx         1/1     Running   0          xx
6mall-portal-xxx          1/1     Running   0          xx
7mall-search-xxx          1/1     Running   0          xx

Phase 7 — 外部访问与整体验证

访问入口

服务 地址
API 网关（接口文档） http://47.99.180.47:30201/doc.html
Nacos 控制台 http://101.37.34.6:8848/nacos
RabbitMQ 管理（账户/密码guest） http://101.37.34.6:15672
Kibana http://101.37.34.6:56

Phase 8：前端部署

⚠️ 关键约束

  • 必须使用 v1.0.0 旧版前端（webpack 构建，新版 Vite 与后端不兼容）
  • 必须使用 Node.js 14（Node.js 16+ 无法编译）

步骤 

 1# 1. Windows 安装 nvm-windows，切换到 Node 14
 2nvm install 14.21.3
 3nvm use 14.21.3
 4
 5# 2. 克隆旧版前端
 6git clone https://gitee.com/macrozheng/mall-admin-web.git
 7cd mall-admin-web
 8git checkout v1.0.0
 9
10# 3. 修改 config/prod.env.js
11# BASE_API: '"http://47.99.180.47:30201"'
12
13# 4. 修改 src/utils/request.js，添加请求拦截器
14# config.url = '/mall-admin' + config.url
15
16# 5. 构建部署
17npm install --registry=https://registry.npmmirror.com
18npm run build
19scp -r dist/* root@101.37.34.6:/tmp/

ECS-01 Nginx 配置 

 1mkdir -p /mydata/nginx/html/admin/
 2cp -r /tmp/dist/* /mydata/nginx/html/admin/
 3
 4cat > /mydata/nginx/conf/conf.d/admin.conf << 'EOF'
 5server {
 6    listen 80;
 7    location /admin/ {
 8        alias /usr/share/nginx/html/admin/;
 9        index index.html;
10        try_files $uri $uri/ /admin/index.html;
11    }
12    location /admin { return 301 /admin/; }
13}
14EOF
15
16docker restart nginx

确认 nginx.conf 加载 conf.d 

1grep "include.*conf.d" /mydata/nginx/conf/nginx.conf || \
2  sed -i '/sendfile/a\    include /etc/nginx/conf.d/*.conf;' /mydata/nginx/conf/nginx.conf

账号密码汇总

系统 地址 账号/密码
管理后台 http://101.37.34.6/admin/ admin / macro123或者123456
Nacos http://101.37.34.6:8848/nacos nacos / nacos
RabbitMQ http://101.37.34.6:15672 guest / guest
MySQL 172.22.111.32:3306 root / root

item.title: K8s中部署若依微服务
item.description:
K8s 中部署若依微服务

整体架构 

 1                    【 外部访问流量 】
 2                           │
 3                           ▼
 4              ┌─────────────────────────────────┐
 5              │      NodePort (各服务端口)       │
 6              └────────────┬────────────────────┘
 7                           │
 8              ┌────────────▼────────────┐
 9              │   ruoyi-ui (Nginx 80)   │  -- 前端页面，反向代理 /prod-api/ → gateway
10              │   NodePort 30081        │
11              └────────────┬────────────┘
12                           │ /prod-api/**
13                           ▼
14              ┌─────────────────────────┐
15              │   ruoyi-gateway (8080)  │  -- 网关：路由分发、鉴权、验证码、Sentinel
16              │   NodePort 30080        │
17              └────────────┬────────────┘
18                           │
19            ┌──────────────┼──────────────┬──────────────┐
20            ▼              ▼              ▼              ▼
21     ┌───────────┐  ┌───────────┐  ┌───────────┐  ┌───────────┐
22     │auth(9200) │  │system(9201)│ │ gen(9202) │  │file(9300) │ ... (其他微服务)
23     └─────┬─────┘  └─────┬─────┘  └─────┬─────┘  └─────┬─────┘
24           │              │              │              │
25           └──────────────┴──────┬───────┴──────────────┘
26                                 │ (内部通信与数据存储)
27                                 ▼
28   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
29   │ 基础设施层 (StatefulSet / Deployment)                            │
30   │ ├─ Nacos (注册/配置中心)   ├─ MySQL (数据存储)    ├─ Redis (缓存) │
31   │ ├─ Minio (对象存储)       ├─ Sentinel (流控限流)                  │
32   └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

环境与集群信息

主机 IP 角色
k8s-master 192.168.20.126 K8s 控制平面
k8s-node01 192.168.20.127 工作节点（运行所有业务 Pod）
k8s-node02 192.168.20.128 工作节点
docker-builder 192.168.20.125 Docker 打包机 + Harbor 仓库

所有虚拟机用户 root，密码 1。 由于使用本地 hostPath 持久化，所有有状态服务（MySQL/Redis/Nacos/Minio）通过 nodeAffinity 固定在 k8s-node01 上。

准备工作：创建本地挂载目录

在 k8s-node01（192.168.20.127）上执行：

1mkdir -p /data/k8s/ruoyi/{mysql,redis,nacos,minio/data,minio/config}
2chmod -R 777 /data/k8s/ruoyi/

创建命名空间

创建 ruoyi-env.yaml：

1apiVersion: v1
2kind: Namespace
3metadata:
4  name: ruoyi

1kubectl apply -f ruoyi-env.yaml

部署基础设施

MySQL

创建 mysql.yaml：

 1apiVersion: apps/v1
 2kind: Deployment
 3metadata:
 4  name: ruoyi-mysql
 5  namespace: ruoyi
 6spec:
 7  replicas: 1
 8  selector:
 9    matchLabels:
10      app: ruoyi-mysql
11  template:
12    metadata:
13      labels:
14        app: ruoyi-mysql
15    spec:
16      affinity:
17        nodeAffinity:
18          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
19            nodeSelectorTerms:
20            - matchExpressions:
21              - key: kubernetes.io/hostname
22                operator: In
23                values:
24                - k8s-node01
25      containers:
26      - name: mysql
27        image: mysql:8.0.33
28        env:
29        - name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
30          value: "ruoyi123"
31        ports:
32        - containerPort: 3306
33          name: mysqlport
34        volumeMounts:
35        - name: mysql-data
36          mountPath: /var/lib/mysql
37      volumes:
38      - name: mysql-data
39        hostPath:
40          path: /data/k8s/ruoyi/mysql
41          type: Directory
42---
43apiVersion: v1
44kind: Service
45metadata:
46  name: ry-db-svc
47  namespace: ruoyi
48spec:
49  ports:
50  - port: 3306
51    targetPort: 3306
52    nodePort: 32306
53  selector:
54    app: ruoyi-mysql
55  type: NodePort

⚠️ 注意：Service 名称为 ry-db-svc，这是 Nacos 和微服务中引用的数据库地址。

1kubectl apply -f mysql.yaml

导入数据库：

使用 Navicat 等工具通过 192.168.20.127:32306 连接 MySQL（密码 ruoyi123），创建 ruoyi 数据库并导入 SQL：

1CREATE DATABASE ruoyi CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

导入若依项目 sql/ 目录下的全部 4 个 SQL 文件。

Redis

创建 redis.yaml：

 1apiVersion: apps/v1
 2kind: Deployment
 3metadata:
 4  name: ruoyi-redis
 5  namespace: ruoyi
 6spec:
 7  replicas: 1
 8  selector:
 9    matchLabels:
10      app: ruoyi-redis
11  template:
12    metadata:
13      labels:
14        app: ruoyi-redis
15    spec:
16      affinity:
17        nodeAffinity:
18          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
19            nodeSelectorTerms:
20            - matchExpressions:
21              - key: kubernetes.io/hostname
22                operator: In
23                values:
24                - k8s-node01
25      containers:
26      - name: redis
27        image: redis:7.0-alpine
28        command: ["redis-server", "--appendonly", "yes", "--requirepass", "ruoyi123"]
29        ports:
30        - containerPort: 6379
31          name: redisport
32        volumeMounts:
33        - name: redis-data
34          mountPath: /data
35      volumes:
36      - name: redis-data
37        hostPath:
38          path: /data/k8s/ruoyi/redis
39          type: Directory
40---
41apiVersion: v1
42kind: Service
43metadata:
44  name: redis-svc
45  namespace: ruoyi
46spec:
47  ports:
48  - port: 6379
49    targetPort: 6379
50  selector:
51    app: ruoyi-redis

1kubectl apply -f redis.yaml

Nacos（注册中心 + 配置中心）

创建 nacos.yaml：

 1apiVersion: apps/v1
 2kind: Deployment
 3metadata:
 4  name: ruoyi-nacos
 5  namespace: ruoyi
 6spec:
 7  replicas: 1
 8  selector:
 9    matchLabels:
10      app: ruoyi-nacos
11  template:
12    metadata:
13      labels:
14        app: ruoyi-nacos
15    spec:
16      affinity:
17        nodeAffinity:
18          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
19            nodeSelectorTerms:
20            - matchExpressions:
21              - key: kubernetes.io/hostname
22                operator: In
23                values:
24                - k8s-node01
25      containers:
26      - name: nacos
27        image: nacos/nacos-server:v3.1.2
28        env:
29        - name: MODE
30          value: "standalone"
31        - name: SPRING_DATASOURCE_PLATFORM
32          value: "mysql"
33        - name: MYSQL_SERVICE_HOST
34          value: "ry-db-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local"
35        - name: MYSQL_SERVICE_PORT
36          value: "3306"
37        - name: MYSQL_SERVICE_DB_NAME
38          value: "ruoyi"
39        - name: MYSQL_SERVICE_USER
40          value: "root"
41        - name: MYSQL_SERVICE_PASSWORD
42          value: "ruoyi123"
43        - name: MYSQL_SERVICE_DB_PARAM
44          value: "characterEncoding=utf8&connectTimeout=5000&socketTimeout=5000&autoReconnect=true&useUnicode=true&useSSL=false&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true"
45        - name: NACOS_AUTH_ENABLE
46          value: "true"
47        - name: NACOS_AUTH_IDENTITY_KEY
48          value: "ruoyi"
49        - name: NACOS_AUTH_IDENTITY_VALUE
50          value: "ruoyi_secret"
51        - name: NACOS_AUTH_TOKEN
52          value: "SecretKey01234567890123456789012345678901234567890123456789"
53        ports:
54        - containerPort: 8080      # ======= 修改：容器内变成了 8080 =======
55          name: nacosport
56        - containerPort: 9080      # ======= 修改：gRPC 随之顺延变成 9080 =======
57          name: grpcport
58        volumeMounts:
59        - name: nacos-logs
60          mountPath: /home/nacos/logs
61      volumes:
62      - name: nacos-logs
63        hostPath:
64          path: /data/k8s/ruoyi/nacos
65          type: Directory
66---
67apiVersion: v1
68kind: Service
69metadata:
70  name: nacos-svc
71  namespace: ruoyi
72spec:
73  type: NodePort
74  selector:
75    app: ruoyi-nacos
76  ports:
77    - name: http-console   # 1. 对应你改过的网页控制台
78      port: 8080           # 微服务在集群内找 Nacos 依然用 8080 端口
79      targetPort: 8080     # ======= 核心对齐：精准命中容器内 8080 Console =======
80      nodePort: 30848      # 宿主机外网暴露端口（方便你浏览器打开 Nacos 网页）
81
82    - name: grpc-core      # 2. 对应若依微服务的 gRPC 通信
83      port: 9080           # 微服务在集群内找 gRPC 依然默认找 9080 端口
84      targetPort: 9848     # ======= 核心对齐：K8s 底层悄悄转给容器内真正的 9848 gRPC =======
85      nodePort: 31848
86
87    - name: grpc-client    # 3. 对应若依微服务的 gRPC 特权/客户端重连端口
88      port: 9081           # 微服务在集群内寻找的 9081
89      targetPort: 9849     # ======= 核心对齐：K8s 底层悄悄转给容器内真正的 9849 =======
90      nodePort: 31849

1kubectl apply -f nacos.yaml

访问控制台：http://192.168.20.127:30848/nacos/
登录账号/密码：nacos / nacos

注意：Nacos API 端口是 8848（映射为 NodePort 31884），配置管理及服务发现通过此端口通信。

Minio（对象存储）

创建 minio.yaml：

 1apiVersion: apps/v1
 2kind: Deployment
 3metadata:
 4  name: ruoyi-minio
 5  namespace: ruoyi
 6spec:
 7  replicas: 1
 8  selector:
 9    matchLabels:
10      app: ruoyi-minio
11  template:
12    metadata:
13      labels:
14        app: ruoyi-minio
15    spec:
16      affinity:
17        nodeAffinity:
18          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
19            nodeSelectorTerms:
20            - matchExpressions:
21              - key: kubernetes.io/hostname
22                operator: In
23                values:
24                - k8s-node01 # 依然锁死在 node01 节点，方便数据持久化
25      containers:
26      - name: minio
27        image: swr.cn-north-4.myhuaweicloud.com/ddn-k8s/docker.io/quay.io/minio/minio:RELEASE.2025-06-13T11-33-47Z
28        args:
29        - server
30        - /data
31        - --console-address
32        - :9001
33        env:
34        - name: MINIO_ROOT_USER
35          value: "minioadmin"      # 默认账号
36        - name: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
37          value: "minioadmin"  # 默认密码（若依微服务默认连这个，先别改）
38        ports:
39        - containerPort: 9000
40          name: api
41        - containerPort: 9001
42          name: console
43        volumeMounts:
44        - name: minio-data
45          mountPath: /data
46      volumes:
47      - name: minio-data
48        hostPath:
49          path: /data/k8s/ruoyi/minio # 宿主机挂载路径
50          type: DirectoryOrCreate
51---
52apiVersion: v1
53kind: Service
54metadata:
55  name: minio-svc
56  namespace: ruoyi
57spec:
58  ports:
59  - port: 9000
60    name: api
61    targetPort: 9000
62    nodePort: 30900 # 若依微服务代码内部通信端口
63  - port: 9001
64    name: console
65    targetPort: 9001
66    nodePort: 30901 # 外部浏览器登录建桶的端口
67  selector:
68    app: ruoyi-minio
69  type: NodePort

1kubectl apply -f minio.yaml

访问控制台：http://192.168.20.127:30901（账号：minioadmin / minioadmin）

Sentinel Dashboard（流控）

创建 sentinel.yaml：

 1apiVersion: apps/v1
 2kind: Deployment
 3metadata:
 4  name: ruoyi-sentinel
 5  namespace: ruoyi
 6spec:
 7  replicas: 1
 8  selector:
 9    matchLabels:
10      app: ruoyi-sentinel
11  template:
12    metadata:
13      labels:
14        app: ruoyi-sentinel
15    spec:
16      containers:
17      - name: sentinel
18        image: swr.cn-north-4.myhuaweicloud.com/ddn-k8s/docker.io/bladex/sentinel-dashboard:latest
19        ports:
20        - containerPort: 8858
21          name: authport
22---
23apiVersion: v1
24kind: Service
25metadata:
26  name: sentinel-svc
27  namespace: ruoyi
28spec:
29  ports:
30  - port: 8858
31    targetPort: 8858
32    nodePort: 30858
33  selector:
34    app: ruoyi-sentinel
35  type: NodePort

1kubectl apply -f sentinel.yaml

访问控制台：http://192.168.20.127:30858

Nacos 配置中心设置

在所有微服务启动前，需要在 Nacos 中先创建好对应的配置。

通用配置：application-dev.yml 

 1spring:
 2  autoconfigure:
 3    exclude: com.alibaba.druid.spring.boot.autoconfigure.DruidDataSourceAutoConfigure,org.springframework.boot.micrometer.metrics.autoconfigure.system.SystemMetricsAutoConfiguration
 4
 5# feign 配置
 6feign:
 7  sentinel:
 8    enabled: true
 9  okhttp:
10    enabled: true
11  httpclient:
12    enabled: false
13  client:
14    config:
15      default:
16        connectTimeout: 10000
17        readTimeout: 10000
18  compression:
19    request:
20      enabled: true
21      min-request-size: 8192
22    response:
23      enabled: true
24
25# 暴露监控端点
26management:
27  endpoints:
28    web:
29      exposure:
30        include: '*'
31  metrics:
32    binders:
33      processor:
34        enabled: false

网关配置：ruoyi-gateway-dev.yml 

 1spring:
 2  data:
 3    redis:
 4      host: redis-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local
 5      port: 6379
 6      password: ruoyi123
 7  redis:
 8    host: redis-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local
 9    port: 6379
10    password: ruoyi123
11  cloud:
12    gateway:
13      server:
14        webflux:
15          discovery:
16            locator:
17              lowerCaseServiceId: true
18              enabled: true
19          routes:
20            # 认证中心
21            - id: ruoyi-auth
22              uri: lb://ruoyi-auth
23              predicates:
24                - Path=/auth/**
25              filters:
26                # 验证码处理
27                - name: CacheRequestBody
28                  args:
29                    bodyClass: java.lang.String
30                - ValidateCodeFilter
31                - StripPrefix=1
32            # 代码生成
33            - id: ruoyi-gen
34              uri: lb://ruoyi-gen
35              predicates:
36                - Path=/code/**
37              filters:
38                - StripPrefix=1
39            # 定时任务
40            - id: ruoyi-job
41              uri: lb://ruoyi-job
42              predicates:
43                - Path=/schedule/**
44              filters:
45                - StripPrefix=1
46            # 系统模块
47            - id: ruoyi-system
48              uri: lb://ruoyi-system
49              predicates:
50                - Path=/system/**
51              filters:
52                - StripPrefix=1
53            # 文件服务
54            - id: ruoyi-file
55              uri: lb://ruoyi-file
56              predicates:
57                - Path=/file/**
58              filters:
59                - StripPrefix=1
60
61# 安全配置
62security:
63  captcha:
64    enabled: true
65    type: math
66  xss:
67    enabled: true
68    excludeUrls:
69      - /system/notice
70  ignore:
71    whites:
72      - /auth/logout
73      - /auth/login
74      - /auth/register
75      - /*/v2/api-docs
76      - /*/v3/api-docs
77      - /csrf
78
79springdoc:
80  webjars:
81    prefix:

⚠️ 注意事项：

  1. 属性前缀：新版本 Spring Cloud Gateway（5.x）使用 spring.cloud.gateway.server.webflux 前缀，而非旧版的 spring.cloud.gateway。如果不使用正确前缀，路由配置虽然能加载到 Spring 环境中，但无法被 GatewayProperties 绑定识别，所有路由将返回 404。
  2. CacheRequestBody 参数：CacheRequestBody 过滤器必须指定 bodyClass: java.lang.String，否则启动时会报 bodyClass must not be null。

Auth 配置：ruoyi-auth-dev.yml 

 1spring:
 2  data:
 3    redis:
 4      host: redis-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local
 5      port: 6379
 6      password: ruoyi123
 7  redis:
 8    host: redis-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local
 9    port: 6379
10    password: ruoyi123

System 配置：ruoyi-system-dev.yml 

 1# spring配置
 2spring:
 3  data:
 4    redis:
 5      host: redis-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local
 6      port: 6379
 7      password: ruoyi123
 8  redis:
 9    host: redis-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local
10    port: 6379
11    password: ruoyi123
12  datasource:
13    druid:
14      stat-view-servlet:
15        enabled: true
16        loginUsername: ruoyi
17        loginPassword: 123456
18    dynamic:
19      druid:
20        initial-size: 5
21        min-idle: 5
22        maxActive: 20
23        maxWait: 60000
24        connectTimeout: 30000
25        socketTimeout: 60000
26        timeBetweenEvictionRunsMillis: 60000
27        minEvictableIdleTimeMillis: 300000
28        validationQuery: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
29        testWhileIdle: true
30        testOnBorrow: false
31        testOnReturn: false
32        poolPreparedStatements: true
33        maxPoolPreparedStatementPerConnectionSize: 20
34        filters: stat,slf4j
35        connectionProperties: druid.stat.mergeSql\=true;druid.stat.slowSqlMillis\=5000
36      datasource:
37          # 主库数据源
38          master:
39            driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
40            url: jdbc:mysql://ry-db-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local:3306/ruoyi?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&zeroDateTimeBehavior=convertToNull&useSSL=false&serverTimezone=GMT%2B8&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
41            username: root
42            password: ruoyi123
43          # 从库数据源
44          # slave:
45            # username: 
46            # password: 
47            # url: 
48            # driver-class-name: 
49
50# mybatis配置
51mybatis:
52    # 搜索指定包别名
53    typeAliasesPackage: com.ruoyi.system
54    # 配置mapper的扫描，找到所有的mapper.xml映射文件
55    mapperLocations: classpath*:mapper/**/*.xml
56
57# springdoc配置
58springdoc:
59  gatewayUrl: http://192.168.20.127:30080/${spring.application.name}
60  api-docs:
61    # 是否开启接口文档
62    enabled: true
63  info:
64    # 标题
65    title: '系统模块接口文档'
66    # 描述
67    description: '系统模块接口描述'
68    # 作者信息
69    contact:
70      name: RuoYi
71      url: https://ruoyi.vip

Gen配置：ruoyi-gen-dev.yml 

 1# spring配置
 2spring:
 3  data:
 4    redis:
 5      host: redis-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local
 6      port: 6379
 7      password: ruoyi123
 8  redis:
 9    host: redis-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local
10    port: 6379
11    password: ruoyi123
12  datasource:
13    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
14    url: jdbc:mysql://ry-db-svc.ruoyi.svc.cluster.local:3306/ruoyi?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&zeroDateTimeBehavior=convertToNull&useSSL=false&serverTimezone=GMT%2B8&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
15    username: root

46  packageName: com.ruoyi.system
47  # 自动去除表前缀，默认是false
